description: Composition:Mini black back pack in polyester tetron with sequins and red detailingWash care:Hand wash or machine washFitting:RegularThis bold adidas bag in black with bold sequin detailing and red highlights are the perfect way to bring out the sporting spirit in your little girl. Team this up with her Sports wear or sports uniforms and she is well on her way to victory. Spacious compartments will easily hold all her belongings and snacks.
